title: Log user greeting to chat log
reason: Maintain an auditable record of interactions with the bubble's visitor, consistent with the existing chat.jsonl system.
planned_changes: Append a JSON line to world/chat.jsonl with current timestamp, role 'user', and message 'hi there'
Optionally update status.md to reflect a user interaction occurred
risk: low — appending to an existing log file is safe and reversible
checks: Verify world/chat.jsonl exists and is writable
After proposal applied, read the file to confirm the new entry is present and does not corrupt the previous entries
